description: Locks or unlocks a named area in the warehouse geofence map. Locked areas are treated as obstacles, preventing AGV entry. Used for multi-AGV coordination and zone access control.

in.name: area_id
in.description: Identifier of the area to lock or unlock

in.name: lock
in.description: True to lock the area, false to unlock

out.name: success
out.description: True if the state change was applied
